programs.title: Neighborhood Watch
programs.desc: Ideas that seemed good at the time. Practical jokes with unexpected results. Best intentions gone awry. Not everything turns out as expected.

programs.desc: An interior designer wants to buy her next house in Phoenix, and her colleague is along to keep her spending and design goals within reason.

programs.title: Rock The Block
